releaseNotes: Initial release based on MDE 2025 Accountability Standards, revised January 13, 2026.
updateInstructions: To publish an annual update: (1) revise index.html with new MDE content, (2) bump appVersion here (e.g. '2026.1'), (3) update mdeRevisionDate and schoolYear, (4) bump CACHE_NAME in sw.js to match (e.g. 'mde-acct-v2026-1'). Deployed users will see an 'Update Available' banner automatically.
